headline: Wells Fargo Downgrades Prudential Financial, Inc. (PRU) to Underweight and Lowers its Price Target to $103
summary: Prudential Financial, Inc. (NYSE:PRU) is among the 13 Most Undervalued S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On February 25, 2026, Wells Fargo downgraded Prudential Financial, Inc. (NYSE:PRU) to Underweight from Equal Weight and lowered its price target to $103 from $115 previously. The firm said the shares are “cheap” but lack positive catalysts. Wells Fargo […]
